articles.description: India face Zimbabwe in the ICC T20 World Cup in Chennai - follow live scores, radio commentary and video highlights.
articles.title: India vs Zimbabwe LIVE: ICC T20 World Cup 2026 - cricket score, radio & video highlights

articles.description: A "distasteful joke" by US President Donald Trump overshadows the achievement of female athletes at the Winter Olympics, says USA ice hockey gold medallist Hilary Knight.
articles.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: Donald Trump joke 'overshadows' US women's success - Hilary Knight

articles.description: Manchester United goalkeeper Senne Lammens says he is "just a normal guy", but his reputation is growing after an impressive debut season at Old Trafford.
articles.title: Senne Lammens: Manchester United keeper on being 'a normal guy' and life in Premier League

articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes part-owner of Spanish second division side Almeria after acquiring a 25% share in the Saudi Arabian-owned club.
articles.title: Cristiano Ronaldo buys 25% share in Spanish second division side Almeria

articles.description: Real Madrid launch an investigation after a supporter allegedly performed a Nazi salute before the club's Champions League win against Benfica on Wednesday.
articles.title: Real Madrid condemn fan who appeared to perform Nazi salute before Benfica tie

articles.description: Aiden Markram smacks 82 not out off 46 balls as South Africa beat West Indies by nine wickets to maintain their unbeaten record at the 2026 T20 World Cup
articles.title: T20 World Cup: South Africa stay unbeaten with nine-wicket win over West Indies

articles.description: Veteran promoter Frank Warren confirms he is considering legal action against Saudi Arabian-owned Sela and American company TKO.
articles.title: Boxing: Frank Warren in potential legal dispute with Sela and TKO over Zuffa Boxing

articles.description: England will consider leg-spinner Rehan Ahmed for Friday's T20 World Cup match against New Zealand with spinning conditions expected.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: England consider Rehan Ahmed for New Zealand match in Colombo

articles.description: A radical new structure for English rugby is set to be rubber-stamped by the RFU, with the Prem separating from the rest of the pyramid, and promotion and relegation scrapped.
articles.title: RFU set to confirm radical restructure of English rugby

articles.description: The "clock is ticking" for the Premier League and EFL to end their financial impasse, says the chair of the Independent Football Regulator.
articles.title: Premier League: 'Clock is ticking' on stand-off with EFL, says regulator
